description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a distinctive angular design. The rifle features a skeletonized folding stock at the rear, a prominent pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the handguard has ventilation slots for cooling. The barrel is short and ends flush with the handguard, with no visible muzzle device. Red safety/fire selector markings are visible above the trigger, adding a touch of color to the otherwise monochrome appearance.
description: A compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a folding skeleton stock, short barrel, and detachable box magazine. It features a full-length Picatinny rail and red safety markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the folding skeleton stock, pistol grip, magazine, and full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view showing the slim profile of the rifle and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same features as view 0, with the magazine and stock visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Narrow end-on view from the rear, showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the rifle's components.
